_publications._publicationTitle: Aberrant ATRX protein expression is associated with poor overall survival in NF1-MPNST.

_contextSnippet: we did observe a statistically significant decrease in OS for patients with NF1-MPNSTs who have aberrant ATRX expression (Figure 4B, p = 0.0276, log rank test)
details: Successfully performed survival analysis showing statistically significant decrease in overall survival for NF1-MPNSTs with aberrant ATRX expression (p = 0.0276, log rank test)
